## Slide 2
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD Spiral Freezer Belt · Why Specification Must Be Right Before Production ▶  A Spiral Freezer Belt Is Not a Standard Conveyor Belt. The belt operates inside a turning, low-temperature, food-processing environment. If the structure is not matched correctly, the system will not run. Drum diameter wrong The belt cannot navigate the drum. Running resistance, jamming, or edge stress appear immediately after installation. Spiral pitch incorrect Pitch mismatch against drum geometry causes uneven tension across the belt width. Tracking error and premature link failure follow. Material grade insufficient SUS304 is the standard. SUS316L is required for high-salt or aggressive cleaning environments. Wrong grade causes corrosion within months. Weld variation batch-to-batch Manual welding produces ±0.5mm variation. One weak joint in a 400m belt is enough to cause failure — at an unpredictable point. ✓  Before recommending a spiral freezer belt, YIYI reviews drum diameter, pitch, material grade, cleaning method, and drive structure. Ningjin Yiyi Mesh Belt Co., Ltd  |  info@yiyimeshbelt.com  |  www.yiyimeshbelt.com  |  WhatsApp: +86 134 5177 3742

Three manufacturing capabilities eliminate the root causes of spiral freezer belt failure. 02 · Robotic Welding · 5 Arms · ±0.05mm Weld Tolerance image/jpeg;base64, 03 · Drum Fit Validation · ø 2400 mm · Test Report Issued Wire drawn in-house from raw coil. SUS304 and SUS316L. Alloy, tensile strength, and hardness tested on every batch before production. 5 robotic welding arms. Every joint to identical specification. The sample and batch produced on the same arms, same setting. Every OEM spiral belt project tested on drum before batch approval. Drum diameter, turn ratio, and pitch confirmed. ## Slide 4
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD Drum Fit Validation · Every OEM Project · Test Report Issued Before Batch ▶  No Spiral Belt Batch Is Released Without Drum Test Approval. The drum test is the only way to confirm that the belt will navigate the drum correctly — before mass production begins. Drum Fit Validation: ø 2400 mm  ·  Real Customer Order  ·  YIYI Production Facility WHAT THE DRUM TEST CONFIRMS Drum diameter confirmed Belt wraps correctly at the exact drum diameter in your equipment drawing. Turn ratio verified Belt navigates the drum without resistance, jamming, or edge stress. Spiral pitch match Pitch confirmed against drum geometry — no uneven tension or tracking error. Dimensional report issued Wire diameter, rod pitch, spiral pitch, width — all measured and recorded. Test report with photos Full written report issued before batch approval. ## Slide 7
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD Edge Treatment · 5 Options · Matched to Equipment Frame and Drive System ▶  The Edge Determines How the Belt Fits the Frame. Edge treatment is specified from your equipment drawing. The wrong edge type causes belt tracking problems and premature wear. Production Workers · Manual Assembly Check — Uniformity Verified image/jpeg;base64, Burr-Free Check — Hand Tactile Verification Welded Edge Rod ends welded to the outermost spiral. Most common for standard conveyor applications. Clean finish, no protruding elements. Folded Edge Outer spirals folded back on themselves. Provides a smooth, enclosed edge. Suitable for applications where product contact at the edge is a concern. Reinforced Edge Additional wire or rod welded along the belt edge. Used where the belt experiences high lateral tension or where edge strength is critical. Loop Edge End rods bent into a loop formation. Used for specific drive systems where loops engage with sprockets or guides along the edge. Custom Edge Matched from your equipment drawing or existing belt sample. Any edge profile accepted. Confirmation issued before production. Ningjin Yiyi Mesh Belt Co., Ltd  |  info@yiyimeshbelt.com  |  www.yiyimeshbelt.com  |  WhatsApp: +86 134 5177 3742

## Slide 8
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD Surface Treatment · Acid Pickling · Electropolishing · Food Safety Compliance ▶  Surface Treatment Affects Hygiene, Corrosion Resistance, and Cleaning Efficiency. Two surface treatment options are available. Selection depends on application, cleaning method, and food safety requirements. Surface Texture — Close-up Review image/jpeg;base64, Final Surface — Pre-shipment Check OPTION A  ·  Acid Pickling & Passivation Surface cleaned with acid solution to remove scale, heat discolouration, and surface contaminants from the welding process. Passivation layer applied to restore and strengthen the natural chromium oxide film on the stainless steel surface. Improves general corrosion resistance. Suitable for: standard food processing environments · IQF freezing · most spiral freezer applications. OPTION B  ·  Electropolishing Electrochemical process that removes a fine, uniform layer from the entire belt surface. Micro-peaks and surface irregularities are eliminated — resulting in a smooth, bright, mirror-like finish. Reduces surface roughness by 50% or more. Significantly improves cleanability and reduces bacterial adhesion. Suitable for: high-care food environments · meat and seafood processing · applications with strict hygiene audits. All parameters accepted as custom input. No standard product forced onto your system. Drum Diameter Custom to drawing Confirmed by Drum Test on every OEM project. Spiral Pitch Custom to drawing Matched to drum geometry. Confirmed before production. Rod Pitch Custom to drawing Matched to equipment frame spacing. Wire Diameter 1.0 mm → 12 mm Full range drawn in-house. SUS304 or SUS316L. Belt Width Custom to drawing Any width. Tolerance confirmed against drawing. Material Grade SUS304 / SUS316L / SUS316Ti Material certificate issued with every order. Temperature −45°C to −18°C IQF and spiral freezing applications. Edge Treatment 5 types available Welded · folded · reinforced · loop · custom. Surface Treatment Acid pickling or electropolishing Selected to application and hygiene requirement.
